channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [GRAVITY] Gravity India Ltd Receives In-principal Approval for Rights Issue of Equity Shares
item.description:
Gravity India Ltd has received in-principal approval from BSE Limited for the proposed Rights Issue of the Company. The approval letter was received on March 16, 2026. The Company is required to comply with all legal and statutory formalities before finalizing its offer documents. The Exchange has granted in-principle approval for listing of Fully paid-up equity shares proposed to be issued on rights basis, subject to the Company’s completing post-issue requirements and complying with the necessary statutory, legal & listing formalities.

  • Gravity India Ltd has received in-principal approval from BSE Limited for the proposed Rights Issue of the Company.
  • The Company is required to comply with all legal and statutory formalities before finalizing its offer documents.
  • The Exchange has granted in-principal approval for listing of Fully paid-up equity shares proposed to be issued on rights basis.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GRAVITY (INDIA) LTD.-$ | Category: Investment

item.title: [NPST] NPST Secures UPI Switch Mandate from Large Cooperative Bank, Enabling Digital Payment Acceptance
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Network People Services Technologies Limited (NPST) has announced securing a strategic mandate from a large cooperative bank to deploy its flagship UPI Switch infrastructure. This is the first order under NPST's Bank-in-a-Box offering within the UPI solutions suite, enabling banks to rapidly deploy scalable, enterprise-grade payment infrastructure without large upfront investments. The bank will be equipped to enter the UPI merchant acquiring ecosystem, expanding digital payment acceptance across its merchant network and unlocking new revenue streams.

  • NPST secures UPI Switch Mandate from a large cooperative bank
  • First order under NPST's Bank-in-a-Box offering within UPI solutions suite
  • Banks can rapidly deploy scalable, enterprise-grade payment infrastructure
  • Cooperative bank to enter UPI merchant acquiring ecosystem
  • Expansion of digital payment acceptance and unlocking new revenue streams

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Network People Services Technologies Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [GIPCL] Gujarat Industries Power Company Ltd Appoints Shri Jenu Devan, IAS as an Additional Director
item.description:
Gujarat Industries Power Company Ltd has appointed Shri Jenu Devan, IAS (DIN: 07852736), Secretary (Expenditure), Finance Department, Government of Gujarat, as an Additional Director (Nominee of Government of Gujarat) of the Company with effect from 17th March, 2026. Shri Devan is an IAS Officer of 2006 batch with a Master of Commerce and MA (Public Policy) degrees. He has held several important positions in the Government of Gujarat and is currently posted as Secretary (Expenditure) in the Finance Department, Government of Gujarat. He has also been appointed as Managing Director in Madhya Gujarat Vij Company Limited and as a Director in Gujarat Fibre Grid Network Limited. Shri Devan is not related to any of the Directors of the Company and is not debarred from holding the Office of Director by virtue of any SEBI order or any other such authority.

  • Gujarat Industries Power Company Ltd appoints Shri Jenu Devan, IAS as an Additional Director
  • Shri Devan is an IAS Officer of 2006 batch with a Master of Commerce and MA (Public Policy) degrees
  • Shri Devan has held several important positions in the Government of Gujarat
  • Shri Devan is currently posted as Secretary (Expenditure) in the Finance Department, Government of Gujarat
  • Shri Devan has been appointed as Managing Director in Madhya Gujarat Vij Company Limited and as a Director in Gujarat Fibre Grid Network Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GUJARAT INDUSTRIES POWER CO.LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [VIVIDIND] Promoter Sumish Mody Acquires 8.17% Stake in Vivid Global Industries Ltd
item.description:
Promoter Sumish Mody has acquired 8.17% stake in Vivid Global Industries Ltd from another promoter Sudhir Mody. The acquisition was made off-market on 16th March 2026. Previously, Sumish Mody held 10.81% stake in the company, which has now increased to 18.98%.

  • Sumish Mody acquires 8.17% stake in Vivid Global Industries Ltd from Sudhir Mody
  • The acquisition was made off-market on 16th March 2026
  • Sumish Mody's stake in the company increases from 10.81% to 18.98%
  • Vivid Global Industries Ltd is listed on BSE
  • The total diluted share/voting capital of the company increases after the acquisition

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VIVID GLOBAL INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [VIVIDIND] Promoter Sumish Mody Acquires 8.17% Stake in Vivid Global Industries Ltd via Off-Market Inter-Se Transfer
item.description:
Promoter Sumish Mody has acquired 8.17% stake in Vivid Global Industries Ltd through an off-market inter-se transfer. The transaction took place on 16th March 2026. Previously, Sumish Mody held 10.81% shares in the company. Post-acquisition, his holding increased to 18.98%. The total equity shares of the company are 91,28,870 of Rs. 10/- each.

  • Sumish Mody, a promoter of Vivid Global Industries Ltd, has acquired additional shares of the company.
  • The acquisition was made through an off-market inter-se transfer.
  • The total shares acquired by Sumish Mody are 74,6004, which is 8.17% of the total shares of the company.
  • Post-acquisition, Sumish Mody's shareholding in the company has increased to 18.98%.
  • The total equity shares of the company are 91,28,870 of Rs. 10/- each.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VIVID GLOBAL INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [PRITIKAUTO] Pritika Industries Ltd. Acquires 12,703 Shares of Pritika Auto Industries Ltd. from Open Market
item.description:
Pritika Industries Ltd., a promoter of Pritika Auto Industries Ltd., has purchased 12,703 equity shares of Rs. 2/- each of Pritika Auto Industries Ltd. from the open market. This acquisition increases Pritika Industries Ltd.'s holding in Pritika Auto Industries Ltd. to 2,35,37,941 equity shares, and the total shareholding of the promoters and promoter group to 9,59,07,391 equity shares. The acquisition was made in compliance with Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Pritika Industries Ltd. purchased 12,703 equity shares of Pritika Auto Industries Ltd. from the open market.
  • This acquisition increases Pritika Industries Ltd.'s holding in Pritika Auto Industries Ltd. to 2,35,37,941 equity shares.
  • The total shareholding of the promoters and promoter group in Pritika Auto Industries Ltd. is now 9,59,07,391 equity shares.
  • The acquisition was made in compliance with Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • The total equity share capital of Pritika Auto Industries Ltd. is now Rs. 33,30,25,334/- (16,65,12,667 equity shares of Rs. 2/- each fully paid up)

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Pritika Auto Industries Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SIPL] Shelter Infra Projects Appoints Dharmendra Kumar Singh as Company Secretary
item.description:
Shelter Infra Projects Ltd. has appointed Mr. Dharmendra Kumar Singh as the Company Secretary with effect from 17th March, 2026. The appointment was recommended by the Nomination & Remuneration Committee and approved by the Board of Directors in a meeting held on the same day. The meeting commenced at 01.00 P.M. and concluded at 03.00 P.M.

  • Mr. Dharmendra Kumar Singh appointed as Company Secretary of Shelter Infra Projects Ltd.
  • Appointment recommended by Nomination & Remuneration Committee.
  • Approved by the Board of Directors in a meeting held on 17th March, 2026.
  • Meeting commenced at 01.00 P.M. and concluded at 03.00 P.M.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHELTER INFRA PROJECTS LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VIVIDIND] Promoter Sudhir Mody Discloses Share Acquisition in Vivid Global Industries Ltd
item.description:
Sudhir Mody, a promoter of Vivid Global Industries Ltd, has disclosed a share acquisition under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The acquisition was made through an off-market inter-se transfer. The total shares acquired represent 8.17% of the total share and voting capital of the company.

  • Sudhir Mody, a promoter of Vivid Global Industries Ltd, has disclosed a share acquisition.
  • The acquisition was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • The acquisition was made through an off-market inter-se transfer.
  • The total shares acquired represent 8.17% of the total share and voting capital of the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VIVID GLOBAL INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [RLFL] Ramchandra Leasing & Finance Ltd Allots 11.4 Crore Fully Convertible Warrants
item.description:
Ramchandra Leasing & Finance Ltd has allotted 11,40,00,000 (Eleven Crores Forty Lakhs) fully convertible warrants to promoters, promoter group, and non-promoters at an issue price of Rs. 4.80/- per Warrant. The warrants are convertible into one Equity Share per Warrant and the allottees can apply for and be allotted equal number of equity shares for each warrant held by them on payment of balance 75% of the issue price within 18 months from the date of issue of these warrants.

  • Ramchandra Leasing & Finance Ltd has allotted 11.4 crore fully convertible warrants
  • The warrants are issued to promoters, promoter group, and non-promoters
  • The warrants are priced at Rs. 4.80/- per Warrant
  • The warrants are convertible into one Equity Share per Warrant
  • The allottees can apply for and be allotted equal number of equity shares for each warrant held by them on payment of balance 75% of the issue price within 18 months from the date of issue of these warrants

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ramchandra Leasing & Finance Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [VSTL] Pratima Sandhir, Promoter of Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd, Acquires 0.02% Shares
item.description:
Pratima Sandhir, a Whole-Time Director of Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd and a promoter group member, has acquired 4000 equity shares (0.02%) through an open market transaction on March 16, 2026. This acquisition is in compliance with the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Pratima Sandhir, a Whole-Time Director and promoter group member, acquired 4000 equity shares (0.02%)
  • The acquisition was made through an open market transaction on March 16, 2026
  • The shares acquired represent 0.02% of the total paid-up capital of Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd
  • The acquisition is in compliance with the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
  • The transaction took place on the National Stock Exchange (NSE)

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd | Category: Acquisitions
